chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 857 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3751/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.3752/2025 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 05.06.2025 Syed Zaffar Ali Shah Bukhari, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that despite approaching the Assistant Commissioner, Taluka Khairpur, for demarcation of his land bearing Survey No.693 of Deh Nizamani, no proceedings have been initiated under the Sindh Land Revenue Act to date. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, learned Additional Advocate General Sindh, who is present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice of this petition and submits that, in order to address public grievances relating to revenue matters, including demarcation of land, through a one- window facility, the Government of Sindh, through Notification No. DD(E&I)/ HQ/BOR/2024.302 dated 21.10.2024 has established a Public Grievances Redressal Cell under the supervision of concerned Deputy Commissioner across Sindh Province. The petitioner may avail this forum by approaching the relevant authority for redressal of his grievance. Learned counsel for the petitioner, in view of the above, submits that this petition may be disposed of with permission to approach the Deputy Commissioner, who is the head of the said Public Grievances Redressal Cell, by filing an appropriate application or complaint. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with the listed application, with direction that if such an application or complaint is filed by the petitioner, the same shall be decided by the concerned Deputy Commissioner, head of the Public Grievances Redressal Cell, strictly in accordance with law, after providing an opportunity of hearing to the parties concerned, within sixty days of receipt of the application.

Learned counsel for the petitioner, in view of the above, submits that this petition may be disposed of with permission to approach the Deputy Commissioner, who is the head of the said Public Grievances Redressal Cell, by filing an appropriate application or complaint. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with the listed application, with direction that if such an application or complaint is filed by the petitioner, the same shall be decided by the concerned Deputy Commissioner, head of the Public Grievances Redressal Cell, strictly in accordance with law, after providing an opportunity of hearing to the parties concerned, within sixty days of receipt of the application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
